title: SmartWatt, BSES seal Muruna Initiative deal at UAE Embassy
description: SmartWatt Consulting and Integrated Energy Services LLC and BSES Rajdhani Power Ltd. formalised a strategic energy engagement under the Muruna Initiative at the Embassy of the United Arab Emirates in New Delhi. The partnership focuses on integrating artificial intelligence, battery energy storage systems, and distributed energy resources to upgrade the electricity network in the National Capital Territory of Delhi.

title: SK Hynix hits the U.S. stock market as demand for memory chips soars amid AI frenzy
description: SK Hynix, one of the world’s largest makers of memory chips, is hitting the U.S. stock market at a time when demand for its chips is far outpacing its ability to make them thanks to the frenzy over artificial intelligence. SK Hynix priced its American depositary receipts, or ADRs, at $149 each Thursday. At that price, the offering of 177.9 million ADRs raised proceeds of $26.5 billion, making it the biggest-ever initial share sale in the U.S. by a foreign company. The shares are expected to begin trading on the Nasdaq later Friday.

title: GALVOC Launches an AI Ecosystem Designed to Give Indian SMBs C
description: New Delhi [India], July 10: Over the years, advanced artificial intelligence solutions have largely remained accessible to corporations with large budgets, dedicated technology teams and expensive consultants. GALVOC intends to change this by introducing an AI ecosystem created specifically for Indian businesses, particularly SMBs. The platform helps organisations access C-suite-level intelligence, automate routine workflows and operate more efficiently without having to build large specialised teams or add significant headcount, while keeping humans involved in important decisions and approvals.

title: HCG uses AI, patient data to personalise cancer treatment: BS Ajaikumar, founder
description: Healthcare Global Enterprises is using artificial intelligence and patient data. Algorithms are being developed to personalise cancer treatment and improve outcomes. The company analyses clinical and genomic data to classify patients for better decisions. HCG partnered with Accenture to enhance its AI research capabilities.
